plugin.name: postgres
plugin.description: PostgreSQL database operations: queries, DDL, schema inspection, connection pooling

conventions.name: query
conventions.description: Execute SELECT query, return rows as list of maps

conventions.name: query_one
conventions.description: Execute query returning a single row or null

conventions.name: create_table
conventions.description: Create a new table with specified columns

conventions.name: list_tables
conventions.description: List all tables in the database

conventions.name: table_schema
conventions.description: Get column information for a table

conventions.name: find
conventions.description: Structured SELECT query builder — accepts JSON spec with table, select, where, join, group_by, having, order_by, limit, offset

conventions.name: find_one
conventions.description: Structured single-row query — same JSON spec as find but forces LIMIT 1, returns Map or Null

conventions.name: count
conventions.description: Count rows matching conditions — accepts JSON spec with table and optional where clause

conventions.name: aggregate
conventions.description: Aggregation query with GROUP BY — accepts JSON spec with select (aggregate expressions), group_by, having, order_by, limit
